headline: Dollar Tree beauty aisle becomes unexpected viral hit
summary: For years, I’ve treated Dollar Tree as a practical shopping stop. It’s where I grab greeting cards, holiday decorations, snacks, and random household items I forgot I needed until I walked through the door. My daughter, however, heads straight for the makeup aisle. She loves the thrill of finding ...

headline: Ahead of Dollar Tree (DLTR) Q1 Earnings: Get Ready With Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Evaluate the expected performance of Dollar Tree (DLTR) for the quarter ended April 2026, looking beyond the conventional Wall Street top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining some of its key metrics for better insight.
